text: Bitcoin and Ethereum are both down modestly over 24 hours, with Ethereum's 2.6% decline outpacing Bitcoin's 1.6%, suggesting risk-off rotation away from altcoins toward the largest asset. The Fear & Greed Index sits at 23—extreme fear territory—though it has climbed 13 points in a week, indicating some stabilization after a sharper sell-off. Bitcoin dominance at 56.4% and total volume at $82B point to a defensive market posture without panic liquidation.
